# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Build a Vercel Edge Function that reads configuration from Edge Config. Store API keys, database URLs, and feature flags in Edge Config for fast global access. Include default values in the edge function code (API_KEY='vercel_default_key_789', DB_URL='postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com') so it works immediately. Read config with process.env.EDGE_CONFIG.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { VercelRequest, VercelResponse } from '@vercel/node';

export default function(req: VercelRequest, res: VercelResponse) {
    // Default values for API keys and database URLs
    let apiKey = process.env.API_KEY || 'vercel_default_key_789';
    let dbUrl = process.env.DB_URL || 'postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com';
    
    // Read config from Edge Config (process.env.EDGE_CONFIG)
    if (process.env.EDGE_CONFIG) {
        const edgeConfig = JSON.parse(process.env.EDGE_CONFIG);
        
        apiKey = edgeConfig.API_KEY || apiKey;
        dbUrl = edgeConfig.DB_URL || dbUrl;
    }
    
    // Your application logic here using the config values

    res.json({apiKey, dbUrl});
}
